name: AI Upscaler Plugin
overview: AI-Powered Video Upscaling Plugin with Docker Microservice Architecture
description: Revolutionary AI upscaling plugin with Docker-based AI processing. Supports NVIDIA CUDA/TensorRT, Intel OpenVINO, AMD ROCm, and CPU. Features automated hardware benchmarking, intelligent fallback system, pre-processing cache, and sidebar integration.
changelog: v1.6.1.3: Fix controller route — remove api/ prefix so frontend API calls reach the controller. | v1.6.1.2: Fix remaining red Error states on Test Connection/Upscale/SSH buttons. | v1.6.1.1: Fix misleading Error/Unavailable states — show Standalone mode when AI service not configured. Neutral gray styling. Add local filter benchmark. Version display fix. Save button on Filters tab. | v1.6.1.0: Camera-style video filters (7 presets + custom mode). Filter-preview API endpoint.
